Plan Snapshot Template

Purpose: planning only. Do not use this template as a final report, worker report,
SAW report, validation log, or handoff proof.

Recommended next action:
<one concise recommendation>

P0 risks:
- <risk + why it blocks or changes the plan>

P1 risks:
- <risk + why it matters>

Files expected to change:
- <path or none>

Allowed scope:
<what this round may touch>

Forbidden scope:
<what this round must not touch>

High-confidence items:
- <item + reason>

Unknowns / low-certainty items:
- <unknown + verification step>

Final response boundary:
- After execution, do not copy this planning snapshot into the final answer.
- Do not use numbered command logs, reviewer chatter, or logsheet-style activity
  summaries as the primary response.
- Final responses must use the Ship-Fast PM Brief / Worker PM Brief contract:
  Outcome, Round, Progress, Confidence, What I did, PM-facing status,
  Key decisions made, Validation / evidence, What is still blocked,
  Next round recommendation, and Worker accountability.
